tldr_zh: Google I/O 聚焦 AI 創新，蘋果強化 AI 輔助功能，Anthropic 迎來 OpenAI 共同創辦人，全球資安與地緣政治挑戰不斷。
tldr_en: Google I/O highlights AI innovations, Apple boosts AI accessibility, Anthropic gains an OpenAI co-founder, while global cybersecurity and geopolitical challenges persist.

items.title_zh: Google I/O 2026 大會登場，聚焦 Gemini 與 AI 代理功能
items.title_en: Google I/O 2026 Kicks Off, Focusing on Gemini and AI Agent Capabilities
items.summary_zh: Google 年度開發者大會 I/O 2026 今日開幕，預計將再次以 Gemini 模型為核心，展示新版 AI 模型與更多具代理能力的 AI 功能。這場盛會將揭示 Google 在基礎模型競賽中的最新進展，並可能推出多項 AI 搜尋與智慧助理創新。
items.summary_en: Google's annual developer conference, I/O 2026, commences today, with expectations centered on the Gemini model, new AI models, and more agentic AI features. The event is set to reveal Google's latest advancements in the foundation model race, potentially introducing innovations in AI search and intelligent assistants.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 共同創辦人 Karpathy 轉投 Anthropic 預訓練團隊
items.title_en: OpenAI Co-founder Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic's Pre-training Team
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 共同創辦人 Andrej Karpathy 已加入競爭對手 Anthropic 的預訓練團隊，負責 Claude 模型的核心知識與能力訓練。此舉是 AI 領域的重大人才流動，凸顯了 Anthropic 在大型模型開發上的野心與資源投入。
items.summary_en: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy has joined rival Anthropic's pre-training team, where he will be responsible for developing the core knowledge and capabilities of the Claude model. This significant talent move in the AI industry underscores Anthropic's ambition and investment in large model development.

items.title_zh: 蘋果強化輔助功能，整合 AI 處理提升 Vision Pro 等體驗
items.title_en: Apple Enhances Accessibility Features with AI Processing for Vision Pro and More
items.summary_zh: 蘋果在其年度輔助功能更新中，為 iPhone、Mac 和 Vision Pro 帶來多項新功能，特別強調裝置端 AI 處理的應用。這些 AI 驅動的改進將提升 VoiceOver、放大鏡、語音控制和輔助閱讀器等功能，甚至讓 Vision Pro 能透過眼球追蹤控制輪椅。
items.summary_en: Apple's annual accessibility update introduces new features for iPhone, Mac, and Vision Pro, with a strong emphasis on on-device AI processing. These AI-powered enhancements will improve functions like VoiceOver, Magnifier, Voice Control, and Accessibility Reader, and even enable Vision Pro to control a compatible wheelchair via eye-tracking.

items.title_zh: Cursor 釋出 Composer 2.5 新模型，改善程式開發表現
items.title_en: Cursor Releases New Composer 2.5 Model, Enhancing Code Development
items.summary_zh: 程式開發代理模型 Cursor Composer 2.5 已在 IDE Cursor 中開放使用，新版模型在長時間任務處理、複雜指令遵循與協作互動方面有顯著提升。這使得模型在多步驟程式開發工作中能更好地維持任務進度，而不僅限於單次回答的優化。
items.summary_en: The code development agent model, Cursor Composer 2.5, is now available in the Cursor IDE, offering significant improvements in handling long-duration tasks, following complex instructions, and collaborative interactions. This enhancement allows the model to better maintain task progress in multi-step programming workflows, beyond just optimizing single responses.

items.title_zh: Redis 推出 AI 代理情境引擎 Iris，強化即時資料應用
items.title_en: Redis Launches Iris AI Agent Context Engine, Boosting Real-time Data Applications
items.summary_zh: 即時資料平臺業者 Redis 推出專為 AI 代理設計的情境與記憶解決方案 Redis Iris，作為代理與企業資料之間的情境引擎。Iris 旨在讓 AI 代理在執行任務時能取得即時且可用的資料，解決傳統上依賴靜態文件或零散整合的痛點。
items.summary_en: Real-time data platform provider Redis has introduced Redis Iris, a context and memory solution for AI agents, acting as a context engine between agents and enterprise data. Iris aims to provide AI agents with real-time and actionable data during task execution, addressing the limitations of relying on static documents or fragmented integrations.

items.title_zh: 美網路安全局 CISA 驚傳外洩大量密碼與雲端金鑰
items.title_en: US Cyber Agency CISA Reportedly Exposed Passwords and Cloud Keys
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦網路安全機構 CISA 被獨立記者揭露，將明文密碼和雲端金鑰上傳至公開的 GitHub 儲存庫，導致大量敏感資訊外洩。這起事件凸顯了即使是負責國家網路安全的機構，也可能面臨嚴重的資安管理疏失。
items.summary_en: The U.S. federal cybersecurity agency CISA was reported by an independent journalist to have uploaded plaintext passwords and cloud keys to a public GitHub repository, leading to a significant leak of sensitive information. This incident highlights that even agencies responsible for national cybersecurity can face severe security management oversights.

items.title_zh: 美國深度偽造法案全面生效，專家憂心言論審查
items.title_en: America's Deepfakes Crackdown Fully Enforced, Experts Warn of Censorship
items.summary_zh: 美國一項要求社群網路迅速移除性深度偽造和其他非自願圖像的法律已全面生效，但專家警告，這項政策可能對受害者幫助不大，甚至可能助長網路審查。該法案旨在打擊非自願的私密圖像，但其執行細節引發了對言論自由的擔憂。
items.summary_en: A U.S. law requiring social networks to swiftly remove sexual deepfakes and other nonconsensual imagery is now fully in force, but experts warn the policy may do little to help victims and could even facilitate online censorship. While intended to combat nonconsensual intimate imagery, its implementation details raise concerns about free speech.

items.title_zh: 伊朗要求科技巨頭支付荷姆茲海峽海底電纜費用
items.title_en: Iran Demands Big Tech Pay Fees for Undersea Internet Cables in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_zh: 伊朗聲稱對荷姆茲海峽的海底網路電纜擁有管轄權，要求大型科技公司支付費用，此舉迫使美國科技公司轉向陸路光纖方案。這項要求加劇了地緣政治緊張，並可能影響全球網路基礎設施的穩定性與成本。
items.summary_en: Iran is demanding that major tech companies pay fees for undersea internet cables passing through the Strait of Hormuz, asserting jurisdiction over the critical chokepoint. This move escalates geopolitical tensions and could compel U.S. tech companies to reroute to overland fiber, potentially impacting global internet infrastructure stability and costs.

items.title_zh: 世衛組織憂心伊波拉疫情擴散加速，剛果報告更多病例
items.title_en: WHO Concerned as Ebola Outbreak Spreads Faster, More Cases Reported in Congo
items.summary_zh: 世界衛生組織（WHO）對中非地區伊波拉疫情的規模和速度表示擔憂，警告疫情可能比最初預期傳播得更快。剛果已報告更多病例，顯示疫情的嚴峻性，促使 WHO 宣布進入緊急狀態，並呼籲國際社會加強應對措施。
items.summary_en: The World Health Organization (WHO) has expressed concern over the scale and speed of the Ebola outbreak in Central Africa, warning it may be spreading faster than initially thought. More cases have been reported in Congo, highlighting the severity of the epidemic, prompting the WHO to declare an emergency and call for stronger international response efforts.

items.title_zh: 歐盟通過鋼品關稅大漲至50%，防堵中國廉價傾銷
items.title_en: EU Approves 50% Steel Tariff Hike to Counter Cheap Chinese Imports
items.summary_zh: 歐洲議會以壓倒性票數通過一項提案，將進口鋼品關稅倍增至 50%，並大幅削減免關稅配額 47%，以保護歐洲鋼鐵業免受中國廉價出口品的衝擊。此舉旨在應對中國產能過剩對全球市場的影響，並維護歐洲產業的公平競爭環境。
items.summary_en: The European Parliament overwhelmingly approved a proposal to double import tariffs on steel products to 50% and slash duty-free quotas by 47%, aiming to shield the struggling European steel industry from cheap Chinese exports. This measure seeks to address the impact of China's overcapacity on global markets and maintain a level playing field for European industries.

items.title_zh: 路透：俄軍人在中國秘密受訓後投入烏克蘭戰場
items.title_en: Reuters: Russian Soldiers Secretly Trained in China Deployed to Ukraine
items.summary_zh: 根據歐洲情報機構及路透社查閱的文件顯示，中國武裝部隊去年底在境內秘密訓練約 200 名俄羅斯軍事人員，其中部分人員已返回烏克蘭作戰。這項消息揭示了中俄之間更深層的軍事合作，可能對烏克蘭戰爭局勢產生影響。
items.summary_en: According to European intelligence agencies and documents reviewed by Reuters, the Chinese armed forces secretly trained approximately 200 Russian military personnel in China late last year, with some already deployed to fight in Ukraine. This revelation points to deeper military cooperation between China and Russia, potentially impacting the situation in the Ukraine war.
